variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14531 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14531 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14531 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson X770132 Air Filter Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14531
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X770132 Air Filter Kit includes all necessary components for efficient air filtration, ensuring clean airflow to the engine. It provides reliable protection against airborne contaminants. Suitable for a range of applications, this air filter kit enhances engine performance and extends service intervals.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4581 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14531
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4581 air filter is installed in front of the carburetor or intake pipe to remove dust and sand in the air and ensure sufficient and clean air in the cylinder.
